title: CF_DocCentralV3_GenerateRegistryNumber — Response Schema
description: Output returned by CF_DocCentralV3_GenerateRegistryNumber to CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument. The flow always returns a structured response — it never throws an unhandled exception to the caller.

oneOf.title: Success response
oneOf.description: Returned when the registry counter was atomically incremented and the delovodni broj was generated without duplicates.

delovodniBroj.description: The formatted registry number, e.g. '42/2026'. Format determined by App Config format string.

counterValue.description: The numeric counter value that was written to App Config. Same number used in delovodniBroj.

activeYear.description: The active registry year read from App Config. Used in delovodniBroj formatting.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID used for this operation's audit log entries.

oneOf.title: Failure response
oneOf.description: Returned when registry number generation failed (max retries, no registry book found, duplicate detected, or unexpected error). CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument must stop and not create the document item.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID, if resolved before the failure.

enum: Registry book not found in App Config.
Max retries exceeded — ETag conflict not resolved.

examples.message: Max retries exceeded — ETag conflict not resolved.
Registry book not found in App Config.

callerGuidance.description: How CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument must handle this response.
rules: If success = false, immediately stop and return failure to the Canvas App. Do NOT create a Svi predmeti item without a valid delovodni broj.
If success = true, use delovodniBroj as the DelovodniBroj field value when creating the Svi predmeti item.
Store counterValue and activeYear if needed for subsequent operations or logging.
Never retry this flow from the caller — retry logic is handled internally by the Do-Until loop.

powerAutomateOutputDefinition.description: Output parameters to define in the Respond to a PowerApp or flow action.

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True if registry number was generated, false on any failure.

outputs.name: delovodniBroj
outputs.description: Formatted registry number. Empty string on failure.

outputs.name: counterValue
outputs.description: Numeric counter written to App Config. 0 on failure.

outputs.name: activeYear
outputs.description: Active registry year from App Config. 0 on failure.

outputs.name: correlationId
outputs.description: Correlation ID for audit log tracing.

outputs.name: errorCode
outputs.description: Machine-readable error code. Empty on success.
